prompt: Apply a mosaic pattern to censor the profile photos and names.
prompt_refined:
Edit image 1 by applying a mosaic pattern to censor all profile photos and corresponding names visible across the three phone screens.
Specifically:
- On the top of each screen (left, middle, right), mosaic the group chat profile icons next to 'Adventures'.
- Mosaic all individual user profile avatars and their associated names (e.g., 'Colin', 'Taylor', 'Amy') appearing alongside chat messages on all three screens.
- Mosaic the small profile icons located in the bottom right corner of each screen.
- On the middle phone screen, additionally mosaic the two small profile icons embedded within the 'Sunday' button.
- On the rightmost phone screen, additionally mosaic the four circular profile icons displayed on the map.
objects: Mosaiced group chat profile icons (on top of each screen)
Mosaiced individual user profile avatars (alongside chat messages)
Mosaiced user names (e.g., Colin, Taylor, Amy)
Mosaiced small profile icons (in the bottom right corner of each screen)
Map on the rightmost phone screen
Mosaiced circular profile icons on the map
'Sunday' button with mosaiced profile icons (on the middle phone screen)
